directive: Build a Go package 'lru' — a generic (Go 1.18+ type-parameter) LRU cache: New(capacity int), Get(key) (val, ok), Put(key, val), Len(), evicting the least-recently-used entry when over capacity; Get and Put both count as a use. Include table-driven tests covering eviction order, updating an existing key, capacity edges (0 and 1), and Get-miss. Make 'go mod init lru' first, then 'go build ./...' and 'go test ./...' both pass from the root.

platform.inference: mixed — local Ollama + frontier vendor CLIs
